\tzpentry{ID3292}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3292 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{H}_{coupling} = \sum_{k,q} g_{k,q} \left( \hat{a}_k^ \dagger \hat{b}_q + \hat{a}_k \hat{b}_q^ \dagger \right) \end{equation}
